languages.original_text: "Your utterances are long-winded, convoluted, and overblown, Genetor. They sow the poison of freethinking in malleable minds and hearts, and infect thoughts with corruption. Accept your penance and humble your heart in repentance."

languages.text: "Твои изречения длинны, запутанны и велеречивы, генетор. Они сеют яд вольнодумства в податливых умах и сердцах, и заражают разум скверной. Прими епитимью и смири сердце в покаянии".

"Your utterances are long-winded, convoluted, and overblown, Genetor. They sow the poison of freethinking in malleable minds and hearts, and infect thoughts with corruption. Accept your penance and humble your heart in repentance."
languages.original_text: "Твои изречения длинны, запутанны и велеречивы, генетор. Они сеют яд вольнодумства в податливых умах и сердцах, и заражают разум скверной. Прими епитимью и смири сердце в покаянии".

"Your utterances are long-winded, convoluted, and overblown, Genetor. They sow the poison of freethinking in malleable minds and hearts, and infect thoughts with corruption. Accept your penance and humble your heart in repentance."

languages.text: «Sus declaraciones son largas, complicadas y exageradas, genetor. Siembran el veneno del pensamiento libre en las mentes y los corazones maleables e infectan sus ideas de corrupción. Acepte su castigo y rinda su corazón en arrepentimiento».
languages.original_text: "Your utterances are long-winded, convoluted, and overblown, Genetor. They sow the poison of freethinking in malleable minds and hearts, and infect thoughts with corruption. Accept your penance and humble your heart in repentance."

traits.locale_text: «Sus declaraciones son largas, complicadas y exageradas, genetor. Siembran el veneno del pensamiento libre en las mentes y los corazones maleables e infectan sus ideas de corrupción. Acepte su castigo y rinda su corazón en arrepentimiento».

languages.text: 「あなたの言葉は冗長で、込み入っていて、大仰です、ゲネター。それは御しやすい精神と心に自由思想の毒を蒔き、思考を堕落で侵します。贖罪を受け入れ、悔悛のうちに心を低くしなさい」
languages.original_text: "Your utterances are long-winded, convoluted, and overblown, Genetor. They sow the poison of freethinking in malleable minds and hearts, and infect thoughts with corruption. Accept your penance and humble your heart in repentance."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの言葉は冗長で、込み入っていて、大仰です、ゲネター。それは御しやすい精神と心に自由思想の毒を蒔き、思考を堕落で侵します。贖罪を受け入れ、悔悛のうちに心を低くしなさい」

languages.text: “你言辞冗长、晦涩且浮夸，基因士。它们在易受影响的思想和心灵中播下自由散漫的毒种，致使腐化感染思维。接受你的惩罚，怀着悔改之心保持谦卑吧。”
languages.original_text: "Your utterances are long-winded, convoluted, and overblown, Genetor. They sow the poison of freethinking in malleable minds and hearts, and infect thoughts with corruption. Accept your penance and humble your heart in repentance."

traits.locale_text: “你言辞冗长、晦涩且浮夸，基因士。它们在易受影响的思想和心灵中播下自由散漫的毒种，致使腐化感染思维。接受你的惩罚，怀着悔改之心保持谦卑吧。”

languages.text: "Eure Äußerungen sind langatmig, gewunden und schwülstig, Genetor. Sie säen in formbaren Gemütern und Herzen das Gift des Freidenkertums und infizieren Gedanken mit Verderbnis. Nehmt Eure Buße an und leistet mit Demut im Herzen Abbitte."
languages.original_text: "Your utterances are long-winded, convoluted, and overblown, Genetor. They sow the poison of freethinking in malleable minds and hearts, and infect thoughts with corruption. Accept your penance and humble your heart in repentance."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Äußerungen sind langatmig, gewunden und schwülstig, Genetor. Sie säen in formbaren Gemütern und Herzen das Gift des Freidenkertums und infizieren Gedanken mit Verderbnis. Nehmt Eure Buße an und leistet mit Demut im Herzen Abbitte."

languages.text: « Vos soliloques sont pompeux et inutilement sophistiqués, genetor. Ils sèment le poison de la libre pensée dans les cœurs et les esprits malléables, et instillent la corruption dans les esprits. Acceptez votre châtiment et trouvez l'humilité dans la repentance. »
languages.original_text: "Your utterances are long-winded, convoluted, and overblown, Genetor. They sow the poison of freethinking in malleable minds and hearts, and infect thoughts with corruption. Accept your penance and humble your heart in repentance."

traits.locale_text: « Vos soliloques sont pompeux et inutilement sophistiqués, genetor. Ils sèment le poison de la libre pensée dans les cœurs et les esprits malléables, et instillent la corruption dans les esprits. Acceptez votre châtiment et trouvez l'humilité dans la repentance. »

languages.text: "Sözlerin çok uzun, karmaşık ve abartılı Genetör. Uysal zihinlere ve kalplere özgür düşüncenin zehrini ekiyor, düşüncelere yozlaşma bulaştırıyor. Kefaretini kabul et ve kalbini kibirden arındır."
